prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-EIGHT-PC-STENCIL Product Type: TEMPLATE_STENCIL Brand (from catalog): Universal Hobby Existing Title: Stencil Drawing Kit With Assorted Shapes - 8 Piece Description: This is the ultimate stencil set with 8 sheets of different stencils.

Features a dedicated oval, circle, and square stencil with varying sizes. Another sheet features circles,hexagons, pentagons, and triangles; and another features perspective shapes. Three sheets feature a high variety of unique assorted shapes in different sizes. Stencils are clear so you can see the rest of your drawing as you draw the stencil.

This is a must-have for artists who enjoy drawing with ink, pencil, charcoal, or pastels. These stencils also work well for painters in the sketching stage of their art. Don't forget this next art project. Search Terms: art supplies stencil drawing crafts Features: - 8 different full-size stencil sheets - Clear so you can see the rest of your drawing as you stencil - Features a dedicated oval, circle, and square stencil with varying sizes - Other sheets feature hexagons, pentagons, triangles, perspective shapes, and assorted shapes. - Great for artists who enjoy drawing with ink, pencil, charcoal, or pastels === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Clear Stencils, Circles, Squares, Ovals, Hexagons, Pentagons, Triangles, Perspective Shapes, Artist Essential

openai.title_differentiation: 8 Clear Stencil Sheets, Oval Circle Square, Geometric And Assorted Shapes, Perspective Shapes, For Ink Pencil Charcoal Pastel
